propositions: Implement PAE encoding per DSSE spec format "DSSEv1" SP len(type) SP type SP len(body) SP body.
Provide DSSE envelope encode/decode for {payload, payloadType, signatures:[{keyid, sig}]}.
Signatures must cover exact opaque stored bytes, never a re-serialized JSON form.
Envelope payload and sig are base64url-encoded and decoded before PAE per DSSE v1.0.0 §3.
Verify byte-identity with duplicate or reordered JSON keys to confirm no re-serialization.
Handle error cases such as empty payload_type and malformed or missing-field envelope JSON.
